title: Issue with importing templates in n8n
symptom: Users are unable to import templates due to old settings pointing to a non-existent instance. The import option does not function as expected.
applies_when: Previously used a different instance for templates
root_cause: The browser may retain cookies and local storage data from the previous instance, causing n8n to reference outdated template import settings. Clearing this data allows n8n to reset and recognize the local instance correctly.
fix_steps: Clear cookies and local storage in your browser
Try importing the template again from the local instance
agent_instruction: Clear your browser's cookies and local storage, then reopen the browser and attempt to import the template again.
